scenario: Reader without tenant.workspace_config.read/manage attempts to read and update tenant security policy.
expected: Both read and write are denied with 403 permission_missing; write requires same-origin header but still cannot mutate without manage permission.
actual: Targeted DB/API regression passes: reader receives 403 permission_missing for security-policy GET and PUT, alongside existing custom-fields/project-template config denials.
codeChange: apps/api/src/app.db.test.ts extends the existing workspace config permission test with security-policy read/update assertions.
evidence: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/app.db.test.ts -t "denies workspace config read and mutation" -> pass; 1 selected test passed, 30 skipped
scripts/seed-dev.ts rerun after DB test to restore local dev seed
codegraph sync -> Already up to date after source edit
notes: Vitest emitted an existing warning about duplicate assignment.delete case in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts; not caused by this slice.
This is permission/write-denied coverage, not duplicate/race semantics for security-policy upsert; duplicate upsert coverage is tracked separately.
